languages.text: "Я не намерен{mf||а} вам помогать. Вы останетесь на мире, замаливать перед Ним грехи свои".

traits.locale_text: "Я не намерен{mf||а} вам помогать. Вы останетесь на мире, замаливать перед Ним грехи свои".
"Я не намерен{mf||а} вам помогать. Вы останетесь на мире, замаливать перед Ним грехи свои".

languages.text: "I am not going to help you. You will stay on this world and atone for your trespasses against Him."
languages.original_text: "Я не намерен{mf||а} вам помогать. Вы останетесь на мире, замаливать перед Ним грехи свои".

traits.locale_text: "Stay here and atone for your sins. Repent and beg Him for forgiveness."
"Stay here and atone for your sins. Repent and beg Him for forgiveness."
"I am not going to help you. You will stay on this world and atone for your trespasses against Him."

languages.text: "Ich werde dir nicht helfen. Du wirst auf dieser Welt bleiben und für deine Sünden gegen Ihn büßen".
languages.original_text: "I am not going to help you. You will stay on this world and atone for your trespasses against Him."

languages.text: "Je ne vous aiderai pas. Tu resteras sur ce monde et tu expieras tes fautes envers Lui."
languages.original_text: "I am not going to help you. You will stay on this world and atone for your trespasses against Him."

languages.text: "我不会帮你。你要留在这个世界上，为你对他的罪孽赎罪。"
languages.original_text: "I am not going to help you. You will stay on this world and atone for your trespasses against Him."

languages.text: "No voy a ayudarte. Te quedarás en este mundo y expiarás tus ofensas contra Él".
languages.original_text: "I am not going to help you. You will stay on this world and atone for your trespasses against Him."

languages.text: 「私はあなたを助けるつもりはない。この世にとどまり、主に対する罪を償うのだ"
languages.original_text: "I am not going to help you. You will stay on this world and atone for your trespasses against Him."

languages.text: "Sana yardım etmeyeceğim. Bu dünyada kalacak ve O'na karşı işlediğin suçların kefaretini ödeyeceksin."
languages.original_text: "I am not going to help you. You will stay on this world and atone for your trespasses against Him."
